About me

Designer who thinks
before drawing

I came to UX from graphic design and print production — building brand identities, brochures, and visual systems. That background gave me a sharp eye for composition, typography, and form.

I recently completed a UX/UI design programme, working on real projects from research to high-fidelity UI — learning to design not just how things look, but how they work.

Looking for a team where I can grow, receive feedback, and solve real problems for real users.
